evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Build shared structures for analysis and reporting focused on quality and auditability
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Responsibilities repeatedly emphasise quality, auditability, testing, and validation with no velocity/speed language present, so the role is rigour-dominated.
evidence.domain_risk: Build shared structures for analysis and reporting focused on quality and auditability
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The platform informs research, education, and administrative decisions at a university without explicit financial-reporting or regulatory compliance language, placing it at moderate risk.
evidence.data_team_maturity: a new, modern platform for data and analytics
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The JD explicitly frames the work as building a new platform from scratch, a clear early-stage/greenfield signal despite the 5-year experience bar.
evidence.jd_authorship: Work with DAX, Power Query, report design, and semantic models
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Responsibilities name precise tools and techniques (DAX, Power Query, semantic models, deployment pipelines) giving a concrete picture of daily work, consistent with hiring-manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Build shared structures for analysis and reporting focused on quality and auditability
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role serves the data/reporting function itself (shared structures, semantic models, report logic documentation) more than any single external business unit, placing it in internal_data.
evidence.autonomy_level: Build shared structures for analysis and reporting focused on quality and auditability
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role both defines shared reporting structures (strategic) and collaborates directly with stakeholders on scoped requirements and validation (execution), giving it a mixed autonomy profile.
evidence.ai_role: Work with AI-assisted development approaches using AI-agents
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to use AI-agent tools to accelerate their own development work, making them an ai_user rather than a builder of AI-facing infrastructure.
evidence.testing_framing: Collaborate with business stakeholders on requirements, definitions, testing, and validation
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and validation are named as an owned responsibility performed directly with stakeholders, not merely a tool in a skill list.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Auditability and data quality are named as a secondary design goal for the reporting platform, without full compliance/regulatory framing, placing it at moderate.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: a new, modern platform for data and analytics
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The explicit charter is to build a new platform rather than maintain or fix an existing one.
evidence.language_gate: Swedish language certification C1 or equivalent
evidence.loss_aversion: Build shared structures for analysis and reporting focused on quality and auditability — auditability is named as a design goal but framed around reporting quality, not regulatory or compliance risk.
